entry.title: lissy93 commented on an issue in dashy
entry.content:
lissy93 commented on lissy93/dashy#1823 · May 16, 2026 07:37
lissy93 commented May 16, 2026
Implemented now, so long as your oidc users are correctly marked as admin or not, and you have `appConfig.disableConfigurationForNonAdmin: true`.
